summary: List Filter Options for Specification Division
description: Returns all Filter Options for Specification Division defined for the project

key.description:
Key is the value (usually an ID) passed in as the filter param
*Division's key is a 1-2 digit string matching the division number

value.description:
Value is the name/description of the value being filtered on
*Division's value is a 1-2 digit string matching the division number
